---
layout: cv
title: Andy Morales' Resume
---
# Andy Morales
Software Engineering student at Brigham Young University-Idaho | Data Science Minor

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mor24120@byui.edu">mor24120@byui.edu</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
| <a href="MoralesResume.pdf">Download Resume PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Student at Brigham Young University-Idaho, majoring in Software Engineering with a minor in Data Science. Expected graduation date: April 2028. 

### Specialized in

- Software development
- Machine learning
- Artificial intelligence

### Research interests

- Machine learning
- Data analysis
- Software engineering for real-world applications
- User experience design
- Productivity-focused systems.

## Education

`2025 - 2028`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho.__

## Projects

### Momentum App
A productivity and goal-tracking iOS app built in SwiftUI with a dashboard, scheduling views, and weekly/monthly progress tracking.

### Portfolio Website
Designed and developed a personal portfolio website showcasing software, data, and web development projects.

### Data Analysis Projects
Built multiple Python-based projects involving data cleaning, visualization, and exploratory analysis using real datasets.

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, SQL
- **Tools:** Git/GitHub, Excel, Tableau, VS Code
- **Concepts:** Data analysis, data visualization, software development, version control


## Leadership & Experience

- Worldwide Online Scheduling and Hiring Assistant at BYU-Pathway Worldwide
- Full-time Representative in Veracruz, Mexico
- Experience leading teams, training volunteers, and improving processes


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
